const SHEET_NAME = "AtlantisRegistrations";

function doPost(e) {
  try {
    const sheet = SpreadsheetApp
      .getActiveSpreadsheet()
      .getSheetByName(SHEET_NAME);

    const data = JSON.parse(e.postData.contents);

    // ── ACTION: UPDATE existing row by orderId ──
    if (data.action === "updatePayment") {
      const orderId = data.razorpayOrderId;
      const paymentId = data.razorpayPaymentId;

      if (!orderId) {
        return ContentService
          .createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ success: false, message: "No orderId provided" }))
          .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
      }

      const allData = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
      const headers = allData[0];

      // Column indexes (0-based)
      const orderIdCol = headers.indexOf("razorpayOrderId");
      const paymentStatusCol = headers.indexOf("paymentStatus");
      const paymentIdCol = headers.indexOf("razorpayPaymentId");

      if (orderIdCol === -1 || paymentStatusCol === -1) {
        return ContentService
          .createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ success: false, message: "Required columns not found in sheet" }))
          .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
      }

      // Find row with matching orderId (rows are 1-indexed, row 1 is header)
      let rowFound = -1;
      for (let i = 1; i < allData.length; i++) {
        if (allData[i][orderIdCol] === orderId) {
          rowFound = i + 1; // +1 because sheet rows are 1-indexed
          break;
        }
      }

      if (rowFound === -1) {
        return ContentService
          .createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ success: false, message: "Order ID not found in sheet" }))
          .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
      }

      // Update paymentStatus to PAID
      sheet.getRange(rowFound, paymentStatusCol + 1).setValue("PAID");

      // Update paymentId if column exists
      if (paymentIdCol !== -1) {
        sheet.getRange(rowFound, paymentIdCol + 1).setValue(paymentId || "");
      }

      // Send confirmation email
      const emailCol = headers.indexOf("email");
      const nameCol = headers.indexOf("name");
      if (emailCol !== -1) {
        const userEmail = allData[rowFound - 1][emailCol];
        const userName = allData[rowFound - 1][nameCol] || "Explorer";
        if (userEmail) sendEmail({ email: userEmail, name: userName });
      }

      return ContentService
        .createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: "Payment status updated to PAID", row: rowFound }))
        .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
    }

    // ── ACTION: INSERT new registration with PENDING status ──
    const institution = data.school || data.college || data.company || "";
    const yearOrStandard = data.standard || data.year || "";
    const department = data.dept || data.role || data.description || "";

    sheet.appendRow([
      new Date(),
      data.name || "",
      data.email || "",
      data.phone || "",
      data.category || "",
      institution,
      yearOrStandard,
      department,
      data.role || "",
      data.description || "",
      data.paymentStatus || "PENDING",   // ← PENDING by default
      data.razorpayPaymentId || "",
      data.razorpayOrderId || ""         // ← store orderId for later lookup
    ]);

    return ContentService
      .createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: "Registration saved with PENDING status" }))
      .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);

  } catch (error) {
    return ContentService
      .createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ success: false, message: error.toString() }))
      .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
  }
}

function doGet() {
  try {
    const sheet = SpreadsheetApp
      .getActiveSpreadsheet()
      .getSheetByName(SHEET_NAME);

    const data = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    const headers = data[0];
    const rows = data.slice(1).map(row => {
      let obj = {};
      headers.forEach((header, index) => {
        obj[header] = row[index];
      });
      return obj;
    });

    return ContentService
      .createTextOutput(JSON.stringify(rows))
      .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);

  } catch (error) {
    return ContentService
      .createTextOutput(JSON.stringify({ success: false, message: error.toString() }))
      .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
  }
}

function sendEmail(data) {
  const userName = data.name || "Explorer";
  const userEmail = data.email || "";

  if (!userEmail) {
    Logger.log("❌ No email found, skipping.");
    return;
  }

  // ... (keep your existing htmlBody email template here, unchanged)
  // abbreviated for brevity — paste your full HTML email body back here

  MailApp.sendEmail({
    to: userEmail,
    subject: "✦ Dive Pass Confirmed — ஆழ்கடலில் ஒரு பயணம் | IARRD Marine Academy",
    htmlBody: "<p>Dear " + userName + ", your registration is confirmed!</p>"
    // ← Replace with your full htmlBody from the original script
  });

  Logger.log("✅ Email sent to: " + userEmail);
}
